events.name: Dappnode + Shutter: Threshold Encryption Running Club
events.description:
​Join Dappnode and Shutter for a fun running competition. It’s one part light exercise + one part intro to running software on Dappnode, Shutter, and threshold encryption.

How it works:
- Participants meet at the starting point at entrance of the Palais des Festivals
- Receive a runner number 
- Intro from Dappnode & Shutter teams 
- Briefing of the threshold encryption running challenge!

​Participants will then split into three running groups based on pace. Each group will have a guide who knows the route and keeps the pace.

​Each group will also carry one-third of a secret message.

​The groups head out and complete their run. All routes take about 35 minutes and are designed to overlap so runners can see and cheer each other along the way.

​Once everyone returns, the three message fragments will be combined and decrypted together to reveal the prize. 

We’ll then do a lucky draw using runner numbers to select the winners.

events.name: Blockspace Forum Cannes
events.description:
Blockspace Forum Cannes is the premier event for exploring the Ethereum transaction journey and the block construction process. 

The day will be packed with high-impact talks, intimate fireside chats, and a minimal number of panels, all focused on the frontier research and emerging ideas currently shaping Ethereum transaction rails. We will host industry-leading speakers and showcase debates that cut to the heart of issues facing the ecosystem today. 

Discussion topics will span censorship resistance, issuance, ePBS, and the evolving dynamics between current actors and the Ethereum protocol itself. 

Join us as we work together to make Ethereum more robust, censorship-resistant, and efficient. We look forward to your engagement and participation! 

Agenda is still a WIP but will be posted ahead of the event.

events.description:
Markets Run on Data. You Run on Coffee. Both Run Better with Allium!

Power your DAS 2026 experience with premium coffee and casual networking at our exclusive Bluetone Lane lounge, open 9 AM to 2 PM!

About Allium
​Allium is the system of record for onchain finance, the trusted data layer between institutions and raw blockchain data. Allium gives enterprises the simplest, fastest way to access onchain data without building data pipelines or using patchwork solutions. Allium ingests raw blockchain data, normalizes anomalies across chains, and serves it via standardized datasets customers can access via queries, dashboards, APIs, datashares, and streaming feeds. Allium provides broad coverage across 100+ blockchains and enriched datasets tailored to specific use cases like lending and stablecoins, built on SOC 1 & 2 certified pipelines with rigorous accuracy checks. Our customers include: Visa, Stripe, Coinbase, Circle, Phantom, Metamask (Consensys), Uniswap, Grayscale.

events.name: Neocypherpunk Summit by Web3Privacy now
events.description:
Web3Privacy Now presents gathering at Berlin's historic Funkhaus, the Neocypherpunk Summit brings together a global network of hacktivists, researchers, technologists, whistleblowers, philosophers, lawyers & policy-makers.

2000 people will celebrate digital rights powered by experts from Ethereum Foundation, Tor, Logos, Open Collective, Dyne.org, Filecoin Foundation, Bitchat & many others.

From defending resistance networks under political duress to scaling cryptography as civic infrastructure, the summit explores how open protocols and privacy tools become a resilient, shared foundation for digital autonomy, free assembly, and accountability.
